profile_backing.source: ready perf bead was absent after p1vbf.24/p1vbf.25 closeout; frankenjax-65m9n was filed from the remaining profiler-evident eig hotspot and the rejected shifted-Hessenberg pass127 evidence.
profile_backing.prior_rejection: frankenjax-6fs4h shifted trailing-2x2 Hessenberg QR regressed 11.380 ms -> 11.645 ms on RCH ts1 and was reverted.

fresh_baseline_before_edit.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=ts2 RCH_WORKERS=ts2 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-65m9n-eig-baseline cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- linalg/eig_48x48_f64 --sample-size 10 --measurement-time 2 --warm-up-time 1 --noplot

lever.description: Replace dense n>=3 Eig QR iteration with safe-Rust Householder Hessenberg reduction followed by explicit Givens QR steps on the Hessenberg form, accumulating the orthogonal basis in-place.
one_lever_scope: retired dense QR helpers are compiled only for the existing internal proof tests
lever.not_in_scope: No BLAS/LAPACK/XLA linkage; no unsafe code; 1x1 and 2x2 analytic Eig paths unchanged.

baseline.code_state: clean detached worktree at 62e938f9 before this lever
baseline.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=ts1 RCH_WORKERS=ts1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-65m9n-eig-baseline-ts1 cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- linalg/eig_48x48_f64 --sample-size 10 --measurement-time 2 --warm-up-time 1 --noplot

candidate.code_state: final candidate after test-only dead-code cleanup
candidate.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=ts1 RCH_WORKERS=ts1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-65m9n-eig-candidate-final cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- linalg/eig_48x48_f64 --sample-size 10 --measurement-time 2 --warm-up-time 1 --noplot

isomorphism.ordering_tie_breaking: 2x2 analytic path ordering and tie behavior are unchanged. For n>=3, public Eig order remains unspecified and is governed by the existing contract's canonical proof summary. The new diagonal 3x3 unit test keeps exact [7,3,-2] order and identity vectors.
isomorphism.floating_point: The n>=3 internal floating-point iteration intentionally changes from dense Gram-Schmidt QR to orthogonal-similarity Hessenberg/Givens QR. This is accepted only under the previously pinned public Primitive::Eig contract; 1x1/2x2 arithmetic is unchanged.
isomorphism.rng: No RNG is present in Primitive::Eig.

validation.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- cargo test -p fj-lax --lib hessenberg -- --nocapture
validation.summary: 1 passed; Hessenberg structure and Q^T A Q similarity checked

validation.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- cargo test -p fj-lax --lib eig_qr_iteration -- --nocapture
validation.summary: 1 passed; 3x3 diagonal deflation order and identity vectors are bit-exact

validation.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- cargo test -p fj-conformance --test linalg_oracle eig -- --nocapture
RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- cargo check -p fj-lax --all-targets
RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- cargo clippy -p fj-lax --all-targets -- -D warnings

validation.summary: The same formatting drift appears in a clean detached HEAD worktree at linalg.rs lines 1316, 3358, and 4139; this lever's git diff whitespace check is clean.
UBS reports existing unwrap/panic/direct-index inventories across linalg.rs; embedded fmt/clippy/check/test subchecks are clean.

next_primitive: Reprofile after this keep; with Eig reduced by ~17x, attack the next measured fj-lax linalg residual, likely SVD or Eigh if it rises to the top.
